fields.title: Define Ralph schema and typed errors
fields.description: Introduce strict Schema-backed Ralph domain models and typed domain errors for loop state, command inputs, summaries, and persisted files. Remove legacy state normalization and fallback parsing in favor of fail-fast schema decoding.
fields.design: Add src/ralph/schema.ts and src/ralph/errors.ts. Model loop status/name/state, command inputs, summaries, and persisted file codecs with branded/constrained schemas and Option-backed optional fields. Represent recoverable Ralph failures with Schema.TaggedError classes.
